ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-31-2012 IN 503, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PER CCP 36(A) AND (D). TRIAL IS SET ON 11/26/12 AT 11:15AM IN DEPT. 503. SUMMARY MOTIONS MAY BE HEARD ON 25 DAYS NOTICE. LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY MOTIONS IS 11/15/12. PLAINTIFF TO MAKE A SETTLEMENT DEMAND ON ALL DEFENDANTS NO LATER THAN 10/26/12. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN ROOM 603 AT 1:30PM ON 11/20/12. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 11/16/12. EXPERT DISCOVERY CUT OFF IS 11/21/12. NO LATER THAN 8/27/12, PLTF MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING, AS TO EACH DEFT, THE NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF PLTF'S CLAIMS. NO LATER THAN 8/27/12, DEFTS MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING THE NAME AND CONTACT INFO OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF DEFT'S AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. ANY PERSON NOT IDENTIFIED ON THE STATEMENTS WILL BE BARRED FROM TESTIFYING AT TRIAL OR PRESENTING A DECLARATION ON A SUMMARY MOTION ABSENT GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. THE PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING ANY OTHER SCHEDULING OR OTHER ISSUE WHICH ANY OF THEM WANT TO HAVE INCLUDED IN THE PREFERENCE ORDER. FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON 10/17/12 1:30PM DEPT. 503. NO NEED FOR ANY PARTY TO FILE ANY CMC STATEMENT. PARTIES MAY APPEAR AT THE CONFERENCE BY TELEPHONE. PARTIES WILL BE NOTIFIED FOR A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE COURT PURSUANT TO S. F. LOCAL RULES OF COURT 5. PARTIES ARE REQUIRED TO SUBMIT STATEMENTS BEFORE THE CONFERENCE. PLTF'S AND DEFTS' REPRESENTATIVES FULLY KNOWLEDGEABLE ABOUT THE CASE AND W/ AUTHORITIES TO SETTLE MUST BE PRESENT, UNLESS THE COURT DETERMINES, PRIOR TO THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, THAT GOOD CAUSE EXISTS TO HAVE THAT PERSON/PERSONS APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. E-SERVICE IS DEEMED EQUIVALENT OF HAND-SERVICE. NOTICE OF EX PARTE HEARING MUST BE SERVED BY FACSIMILE OR FAX. COUNSEL FOR PLTF TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT AN ORDER. JUDGE: TERI L. RULING:
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE

Plaintiff's motion for preference is granted per CCP 36(a) and (d). Trial is set on November 26, 2012 at 11:15am in Department 503. Summary motions may be heard on 25 days notice. Last day for hearing summary motions is 11/15/12. Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on all defendants no later than 10/26/12. Settlement conference in room 603 at 1:30pm on 11/20/12. Fact discovery cut-off date is 11/16/12. Expert discovery cut off is 11/21/12. No later than 8/27/12, plaintiff must provide a statement stating, as to each defendant, the name and contact information of each person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of plaintiff's claims. No later than 8/27/12, defendants must provide a statement stating the name and contact information of each person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of defendant's affirmative defenses. Any person not identified on the statements will be barred from testifying at trial or presenting a declaration on a summary motion absent good cause shown. The parties to meet and confer regarding any other scheduling or other issue which any of them want to have included in the preference order. Further case management conference on 10/17/12 at 1:30pm in Dept. 503. No need for any party to file any case management conference statement. Parties may appear at the conference by telephone. Parties will be notified for a mandatory settlement conference with the Court pursuant to S. F. Local Rules of Court 5. Parties are required to submit statements before the conference. Plaintiff's and defendants' representatives fully knowledgeable about the case and with authorities to settle must be present, unless the Court determines, prior to the settlement conference, that good cause exists to have that person/persons appear by telephone. E-Service is deemed equivalent of hand-service. Notice of ex parte hearing must be served by facsimile or fax. Counsel for Plaintiff to prepare and submit an order. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Sandy Lee of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 971 (503/TLJ)
